stemHtml:
Given the following information, what would be the average ground speed during a descent from FL200 to an aerodrome with elevation 2000 ft?

Average descent speed: 200 kt CAS
Average ISA deviation: -7° C
Average descent track: 165°(T)
W/V at 2000 ft: 030°(T)/30 kt
W/V at 20 000 ft: 090°(T)/60 kt
